key.name: max-entries
key.summary: Maximum number of entries to hold in history

key.name: connection-timeout
key.summary: Timeout for a connection to respond before it is deemed invalid

key.name: data-timeout
key.summary: Maximum timeout to wait when transferring data

key.name: allowed-mime-types
key.summary: List of mime types to store

key.name: mime-type-groups
key.summary: List of mime types to group together
